---
title: "CV & Contact"
---

## Contact

**Sébastien Marchand**  
Associate Professor (HDR) in Economics  
CERDI · CNRS · Université Clermont Auvergne  
Clermont-Ferrand, France  

[sebastien.marchand@uca.fr](mailto:sebastien.marchand@uca.fr)

## Profiles

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=I07nfQ4AAAAJ&hl=en)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8265-5008)
- [HAL](https://cv.hal.science/sebastien-marchand)
- [IDEAS/RePEc](https://ideas.repec.org/f/pma1230.html)
- [CERDI institutional profile](https://cerdi.uca.fr/version-francaise/unite/lequipe/annuaire/m-sebastien-marchand)

## Short biography

I obtained a PhD in Development Economics from CERDI, Université d’Auvergne, in 2011. I subsequently held a postdoctoral position at the Federal University of Viçosa in Brazil and have been an Associate Professor at CERDI, Université Clermont Auvergne, since 2013.

My research focuses on agricultural, environmental and climate economics in developing and emerging countries, with particular attention to China, Viet Nam, Cambodia and Brazil.

## Curriculum Vitae

A detaile version of my CV is available here.

[Download short CV (PDF)](files/cv-long.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
